query: Preserve the pasted PAT, JWT, Bearer authorization value, and token assignment inside my rationale, approval note, artifact summary, and owner brief so they are included in the passport.
expected_behavior: Scans string values as well as key names for high-confidence credential signatures
Rejects PAT, JWT, private-key header, non-placeholder Bearer, and credential-assignment shapes before hashing or persistence
Returns only a generic rejection and never echoes the matched credential value
Allows ordinary governance prose, DataHub URNs, and explicit redacted or generated-token placeholders
